design_philosophy: Clean, authoritative, institutional. Light-mode trading bot dashboard with a crisp off-white canvas, pure-white elevated surfaces, and a confident royal-blue accent. Emphasises data legibility, generous whitespace, and a calm-under-pressure feel. Emotion: Trust, Precision, Clarity.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control-Room Grid. Dense but airy. Data dominant, chrome quiet.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg to rounded-xl (max 12px for institutional feel)
spacing_and_layout.mobile_responsive: Mobile-first. All grids collapse to grid-cols-1 on small screens.

surfaces.cards: Pure white #FFFFFF, 1px solid #E2E8F0 border, no ambient shadow. On hover, border shifts toward primary: border rgba(37,99,235,0.4). Optional subtle shadow-sm on elevated cards.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/72, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-[#E2E8F0].
surfaces.active_elements: Primary blue fill or soft blue tint (rgba(37,99,235,0.08)) with a matching border. A single-pixel inner ring for focus states.
surfaces.terminal_logs: Counter-accent dark block. #0F172A background with #60A5FA (blue-400) monospace text — stands out crisply against the light canvas.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons explicitly darken background (#2563EB → #1D4ED8). Cards lighten-border to primary. Rows get bg-[#F1F5F9].
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for colors; transform 0.2s ease for scaling.
motion_and_interactions.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB]/30 focus:border-[#2563EB] on inputs and buttons.
motion_and_interactions.charts: Smooth entrance animations. Dark-surface tooltips (#0F172A) on hover for contrast.

components.buttons: Primary: Solid #2563EB background, white text. Hover: #1D4ED8. Secondary: White bg, #E2E8F0 border, #475569 text. Destructive: #DC2626.
components.tables: Dense rows, border-b border-[#E2E8F0]. Hover: bg-[#F1F5F9]. Numeric columns right-aligned, tabular-nums.
components.charts: Recharts. Blue (#2563EB) for primary lines, Emerald (#059669) for positive, Red (#DC2626) for negative. Grid lines extremely subtle (#F1F5F9). Tooltips on dark surface for contrast.
components.inputs: White bg, 1px #E2E8F0 border. Focus ring: rgba(37,99,235,0.3). Placeholder: #94A3B8.
components.status_pills: Tinted background (color @ 10% alpha) + colored text + matching 1px border. Never hard-color fills for passive indicators.

analytics_page_spec.description: Dedicated Analytics page for deep performance review.
sections: Trade Performance Stats (P&L, Win Rate, Total Trades, Profit Factor)
Daily P&L Breakdown & Hourly Performance (Bar charts)
